channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Totality is over — Feast your eyes on the 1st photos of the blood moon total lunar eclipse 2026 - Space
item.description:
1. Totality is over — Feast your eyes on the 1st photos of the blood moon total lunar eclipse 2026  Space

  4. Total lunar eclipse: The ‘Blood Moon' will be visible in South Florida  NBC 6 South Florida
  5. Blood moon in Los Angeles: Total lunar eclipse seen across sky in Southern California  ABC7 Los Angeles

item.title: Evidence Grows That One of the Largest Known Stars Is Poised to Explode in a Spectacular Blast - Yahoo
item.description:
1. Evidence Grows That One of the Largest Known Stars Is Poised to Explode in a Spectacular Blast  Yahoo
  2. The dramatic transition of the extreme red supergiant WOH G64 to a yellow hypergiant  Nature
  3. Astronomers just watched a star 1,540 times the size of our sun transform into a hypergiant. Will it go supernova?  Space
  4. A well-known and widely studied star changed from red to yellow in a timeframe that is "too fast" for current models, and astronomers admit they still can't fully explain what happened.  CPG Click Petróleo e Gás
  5. Changes to One of The Largest Known Stars May Signal Destruction  ScienceAlert
